j_sly_joker: +50 Chips if the played hand contains a Pair
j_half: +20 Mult if 3 or fewer cards are played
j_even_steven: Each played even-rank card gives +4 Mult
j_faceless: +$5 if 3 or more face cards are discarded at once
j_constellation: Gains x0.1 Mult per Planet card used
j_ride_the_bus: +1 Mult per consecutive hand with no face card
j_blueprint: Copies the ability of the Joker to the right
j_brainstorm: Copies the ability of the leftmost Joker
j_jolly: +8 Mult if the played hand contains a Pair
j_square: Gains +4 Chips if exactly 4 cards are played
j_zany: +12 Mult if the played hand contains a Three of a Kind
j_mad: +10 Mult if the played hand contains a Two Pair
j_crazy: +12 Mult if the played hand contains a Straight
j_droll: +10 Mult if the played hand contains a Flush
j_wily: +100 Chips if the played hand contains a Three of a Kind
j_clever: +80 Chips if the played hand contains a Two Pair
j_devious: +100 Chips if the played hand contains a Straight
j_crafty: +80 Chips if the played hand contains a Flush
j_scholar: Played Aces give +20 Chips and +4 Mult
j_walkie_talkie: Each played 10 or 4 gives +10 Chips and +4 Mult
j_fibonacci: Each played Ace, 2, 3, 5, or 8 gives +8 Mult
j_shoot_the_moon: Each Queen held in hand gives +13 Mult
j_baron: Each King held in hand gives x1.5 Mult
j_runner: Gains +15 Chips if the played hand contains a Straight
j_duo: x2.0 Mult if the played hand contains a Pair
j_trio: x3.0 Mult if the played hand contains a Three of a Kind
j_family: x4.0 Mult if the played hand contains a Four of a Kind
j_order: x3.0 Mult if the played hand contains a Straight
j_tribe: x2.0 Mult if the played hand contains a Flush
j_trousers: Gains +2 Mult if the played hand contains a Two Pair
j_bloodstone: 1 in 2 chance each played Heart gives x1.5 Mult
j_blue_joker: +2 Chips for each card remaining in the deck
j_stone: +25 Chips for each Stone card in the deck
j_steel_joker: x0.2 Mult for each Steel card in the deck
j_hiker: Each played card permanently gains +5 Chips
j_midas_mask: Played face cards become Gold cards when scored
j_vampire: Gains x0.1 Mult per enhanced card played, removing its enhancement
j_rough_gem: Each played Diamond gives $1 when scored
j_business_card: Played face cards have a 1 in 2 chance to give $2
j_gros_michel: +15 Mult; 1 in 6 chance destroyed at end of round
j_cavendish: x3 Mult; 1 in 1000 chance destroyed at end of round
j_acrobat: x3 Mult on the final hand of the round
j_joker_stencil: x1 Mult for each empty Joker slot (Joker Stencil included)
j_triboulet: Played Kings and Queens each give x2 Mult
j_hanging_chad: Retrigger the first played card 2 additional times
j_flower_pot: x3 Mult if the scoring hand contains a Diamond, Club, Heart and Spade
j_seeing_double: x2 Mult if the scoring hand has a Club and a card of any other suit
j_four_fingers: All Flushes and Straights can be made with 4 cards
j_shortcut: Allows Straights to be made with gaps of 1 rank
j_smeared_joker: Hearts and Diamonds count as the same suit, Spades and Clubs the same
j_mime: Retrigger all cards held in hand
j_dusk: Retrigger all played cards on the final hand of the round
j_golden_ticket: Played Gold cards give $4 when scored
j_photograph: The first scored face card gives x2 Mult
j_drivers_license: x3 Mult if you have at least 16 enhanced cards in your deck
j_blackboard: x3 Mult if all cards held in hand are Spades or Clubs
j_pareidolia: All cards are considered face cards
j_splash: Every played card counts in scoring
j_green_joker: +1 Mult per hand played, -1 Mult per discard
j_fortune_teller: +1 Mult per Tarot card used this run
j_erosion: +4 Mult for each card below 52 in your full deck
j_burglar: +3 hands this round, but no discards
j_raised_fist: Adds double the rank of the lowest card held in hand to Mult
j_cloud_9: Earn $1 for each 9 in your full deck at end of round
j_rocket: Earn $1 at end of round; payout grows by $2 each Boss defeated
j_delayed_gratification: Earn $2 per remaining discard at end of round if no discards were used
j_8_ball: 1 in 4 chance for each played 8 to create a Tarot card (if room)
j_cartomancer: Create a Tarot card when a blind is selected
j_vagabond: Create a Tarot if a hand is played with $4 or less
j_superposition: Create a Tarot if a played hand contains an Ace and a Straight
j_seance: Create a Spectral if the played hand is a Straight Flush
j_marble: Adds a Stone card to your deck when a blind is selected
j_riff_raff: Create 2 Common jokers when a blind is selected (if room)
j_sixth_sense: Play a single 6: destroy it and create a Spectral
j_space: 1 in 4 chance to upgrade the level of the played hand
j_glass_joker: Gains x0.75 Mult for every Glass card that is destroyed
j_canio: Gains x1 Mult when a face card is destroyed
j_yorick: Gains x1 Mult for every 23 cards discarded
j_hit_the_road: Gains x0.5 Mult for every Jack discarded this round
j_burnt: Upgrade the level of the first discarded poker hand each round
j_dna: If the first hand of the round is a single card, add a permanent copy to your deck
j_hologram: Gains x0.25 Mult for every playing card added to your deck
j_certificate: When round begins, add a random playing card with a random seal to your deck
j_ice_cream: +100 Chips, -5 Chips per hand played; consumed at 0
j_popcorn: +20 Mult, -4 Mult per round played; consumed at 0
j_matador: Earn $8 if the played hand triggers the Boss Blind's ability
j_diet_cola: Sell this to create a free Double Tag
j_hallucination: 1 in 2 chance to create a Tarot card when a booster pack is opened
j_red_card: Gains +3 Mult when a booster pack is skipped
j_showman: Joker and Consumable cards may appear multiple times in the shop
j_pizza: At the end of the next PvP blind, consumed for +1 discard to you and +2 to your Nemesis
j_speedrun: If you reach a PvP blind before your Nemesis, create a random Spectral
j_penny_pincher: On entering the shop, gain $1 for every $3 your Nemesis spent last ante
j_skip_off: +1 Hand and +1 Discard per additional blind skipped vs your Nemesis
j_lets_go_gambling: 1 in 4 chance for x4 Mult and $10
j_pacifist: x10 Mult while not in a PvP blind
j_defensive_joker: +125 Chips for every life you are behind your Nemesis
j_conjoined: In a PvP blind, x0.5 Mult per hand your Nemesis has left (max x3)
j_taxes: +4 Mult per card your Nemesis has sold since the last PvP blind
j_throwback: x0.25 Mult for each blind skipped this run
j_turtle_bean: +4 hand size, which decreases by 1 each round
j_seltzer: Retrigger all played cards for the first 10 hands after it is acquired
j_obelisk: x0.2 Mult per consecutive hand played that is not your most-played hand
j_trading: If the first discard of a round is a single card, destroy it and earn $3
j_perkeo: Creates a copy of a random held consumable when you leave the shop
j_invisible: After 2 rounds, sell this to create a copy of a random Joker
j_luchador: Sell this to disable the current Boss Blind
j_ceremonial: When a blind is selected, destroys the Joker to the right and gains 2x its sell value as Mult
j_madness: On Small/Big blind select, gains x0.5 Mult and destroys a random Joker
j_satellite: Earn $1 at end of round per unique Planet card used this run
j_reserved_parking: Each face card held in hand has a 1 in 2 chance to give $1
j_chicot: Disables the effect of every Boss Blind
j_egg: Gains $3 of sell value at the end of each round
j_gift_card: Adds $1 of sell value to every owned Joker at end of round
j_astronomer: All Planet cards in the shop are free
j_mr_bones: Prevents death if at least 25% of the required score was reached (then self-destructs)
j_to_the_moon: Earn an extra $1 of interest per $5 at end of round
j_mail_in_rebate: Earn $5 for each discarded card of this round's rank
j_castle: Gains +3 Chips per discarded card of this round's suit
j_todo_list: Earn $4 if the played poker hand is this round's hand
j_idol: Each played card matching this round's Idol card gives x2 Mult
j_ancient_joker: Each played card of this round's Ancient suit gives x1.5 Mult
j_baseball_card: Each Uncommon Joker gives x1.5 Mult
j_swashbuckler: Adds the sell value of all other owned Jokers to Mult
j_supernova: Adds the number of times the played hand has been played this run to Mult
j_card_sharp: x3 Mult if the played poker hand was already played this round
j_lucky_cat: Gains x0.25 Mult each time a Lucky card successfully triggers
j_campfire: Gains x0.25 Mult per card sold; resets when a Boss Blind is defeated
j_ramen: x2 Mult, loses x0.01 per card discarded; consumed at x1
bl_flint: Base Chips and Mult are halved
bl_ox: Playing your most-played hand sets money to $0
bl_arm: Decrease level of played poker hand
bl_mouth: Play only one hand type this round
bl_eye: No repeat hand types this round
bl_mark: All face cards are drawn face down
bl_house: First hand is drawn face down
bl_fish: Cards drawn face down after each hand played
bl_pillar: Cards played this ante are debuffed
bl_serpent: After each hand or discard, always draw 3 cards
bl_hook: Discards 2 random cards per hand played
bl_final_bell: Forces 1 card to always be selected
bl_final_heart: One random Joker is disabled each hand
bl_final_leaf: All cards debuffed until you sell a Joker
bl_final_acorn: Jokers are flipped face down and shuffled
d_black: +1 Joker slot, but -1 hand each round
d_green: No interest; $2 per remaining hand, $1 per discard
d_erratic: All ranks and suits are randomized
d_magic: Start with the Crystal Ball voucher and 2 The Fool tarots
d_nebula: Start with the Telescope voucher, -1 consumable slot
d_zodiac: Start with Tarot Merchant, Planet Merchant, and Overstock vouchers
d_ghost: Spectral cards may appear in the shop; start with The Hex
d_anaglyph: Double Tag after defeating each Boss Blind
d_plasma: Balance chips and mult; blinds are 2x larger
c_magician: Enhance up to 2 selected cards to Lucky
c_empress: Enhance up to 2 selected cards to Mult
c_hierophant: Enhance up to 2 selected cards to Bonus
c_strength: Increase rank of up to 2 selected cards by 1
c_star: Convert up to 3 selected cards to Diamonds
c_moon: Convert up to 3 selected cards to Clubs
c_sun: Convert up to 3 selected cards to Hearts
c_world: Convert up to 3 selected cards to Spades
c_lovers: Enhance 1 selected card to Wild (counts as every suit)
c_incantation: Add 4 Bonus number cards to your deck
c_talisman: Add a Gold Seal to 1 selected card
c_deja_vu: Add a Red Seal to 1 selected card
c_trance: Add a Blue Seal to 1 selected card
c_medium: Add a Purple Seal to 1 selected card
c_aura: Add Polychrome to 1 selected card in hand
c_black_hole: Upgrade every poker hand by 1 level
c_wheel_of_fortune: 1 in 4 chance to add Foil, Holographic, or Polychrome to a random Joker
c_ectoplasm: Add Negative to a random Joker, -1 hand size
c_hex: Add Polychrome to a random Joker, destroy all other Jokers
c_emperor: Create up to 2 random Tarot cards
c_high_priestess: Create up to 2 random Planet cards
c_temperance: Gain the total sell value of all Jokers (max $50)
c_wraith: Create a random Rare Joker, set money to $0
c_immolate: Destroy 5 random cards in hand, gain $20
c_familiar: Destroy 1 random card, add 3 random Enhanced face cards
c_grim: Destroy 1 random card, add 2 random Enhanced Aces
c_fool: Create a copy of the last Tarot or Planet used this run
c_death: Select 2 cards: the left card becomes a copy of the right
c_sigil: Convert all cards in hand to a single random suit
c_ouija: Convert all cards in hand to a single random rank, -1 hand size
c_ankh: Copy a random Joker, destroy all other Jokers
c_asteroid: Delevel your nemesis's highest-level poker hand
tag_uncommon: Shop has a free Uncommon Joker
tag_rare: Shop has a free Rare Joker
tag_negative: Next base shop Joker is free and Negative
tag_foil: Next base shop Joker is free and Foil
tag_holo: Next base shop Joker is free and Holographic
tag_polychrome: Next base shop Joker is free and Polychrome
tag_investment: Gain $25 after defeating the next Boss Blind
tag_voucher: Adds one Voucher to the next shop
tag_coupon: Initial shop cards & packs are free
tag_double: Gives a copy of the next selected tag
tag_d_six: Rerolls in the next shop start at $0
tag_orbital: Upgrade your most-played hand by 3 levels
v_omen_globe: Spectral cards may appear in Arcana Packs
v_telescope: Celestial Packs always contain your most-played hand's Planet
v_observatory: Planet cards in your consumables give X1.5 Mult for their hand
v_tarot_merchant: Tarot cards appear 2x more in the shop
v_tarot_tycoon: Tarot cards appear 4x more in the shop
v_planet_merchant: Planet cards appear 2x more in the shop
v_planet_tycoon: Planet cards appear 4x more in the shop
v_seed_money: Raise the interest cap to $10 per round
v_money_tree: Raise the interest cap to $20 per round
v_magic_trick: Playing cards can be bought from the shop
v_illusion: Shop playing cards may have an Enhancement and/or Edition
v_directors_cut: Reroll the Boss Blind once per ante ($10)
v_retcon: Reroll the Boss Blind unlimited times ($10)
